title: 2020 - 2021  Eğitim – Öğretim Yılı Özel Yetenek Bursluluk Sınavı Bilgilendirme
content:
Duyurular

Detay

Attention to students registered to Department of Fashion Design, Acting Department, Department of Graphics (Turkish) and Department of Graphics (English) in 2020-2021 academic year, 100% Scholarship Exam will be held on 19.11.2020,

• The exam will be held at Çengelköy Campus  between 14: 00-17: 30 for the students of the Department of Acting;

• The exam will be held at Çengelköy Campus  between 11: 00-13: 00 for the students of Department of Fashion Design, Department of Graphic (Turkish) and Department of Graphics (English).

Only the student who registered in 2020-2021 academic year are eligible to take the exam (except foreign national students). Students who enroll in these departments with a special talent exam in the 2020-2021 academic year will not have the right to take the 100% Scholarship Exam to be held next year

1-Students must be in the examination room at least 30 minutes before the exam begins.

2- The duration of the examination is 2 hours.

3- It is essential that the students come to the hall before the exam time. Students who are late will only be allowed during the first 30 minutes of the exam.

4. It is forbidden to leave the exam in the first 30 minutes of the exam.

5- In order for the examination to be carried out in accordance with the rules, the students must comply with the warnings made by the supervisors.

6- Candidate students are required to write their names, surnames, student numbers and sections on the exam paper.

7- Candidates must keep their identity documents on their desks during the exam.

8- In the examination period, the identity documents will be checked and the attendance will be taken.

9- Cell phones and digital watches should be kept closed in case of bringing to the examination room.

10- It is forbidden to leave the exam room temporarily after the exam has started. It is at the discretion of the chief invigilator of the hall to decide whether or not to allow entry-exits due to compulsory reasons.

11- It is forbidden to take photos during the exam.

12- Students should bring pencils with erasers and pencil sharpener for the exam.

13- Examination hall staff can arrange a report about the students who break the rules and disturb the process of the exam.

14- After the exam is over, the students must submit the exam papers to the chief invigilator of the hall and sign.
